The New Issue of Kadir Has University Faculty of  Journal Has Been Published!

Dear Kadir Has University Members,

We are delighted to announce that the Kadir Has University Faculty of Law Journal Vol. XIII N. 2 has been published!
  You can access the published articles in print or electronically through the Jurix database. For detailed information
  about our journal, which is being scanned in ULAKBİM TRDizin, you are welcome to visit

hfd.khas.edu.tr

.

Published articles in our latest issue are as follows:

PUBLIC LAW

The Interaction Between Artificial Intelligence and the Right to Health: Bioethics, Data Security and Access Equality

Asst. Prof. Cem Ümit BEYOĞLU

The Semantics of Legal Statements: An Analysis of the Hart–Raz Debate

Asst. Prof. Hüseyin GÜNAL

Are American Independent Regulatory Agencies Still Independent: The U.S. Supreme Court’s Tendency to Empower the U.S. President

Consensual Seizure in Criminal Procedure Law: Some Findings and Recommendations Regarding the Condition of Consent in Consensual Seizure in Light of United States Supreme Court Decisions

The Limits of Judicial Discretion in Sentencing: The Problem of Objectifying Mitigating Circumstances in Criminal Justice

Asst. Prof. Bilgehan SAVAŞCI TEMİZ

The Examination of the Publication of Extraordinary Administrative Procedures in the Context of Comparative Law

Ecocide and the Evidentiary Framework of the International Criminal Court

Asst. Prof. Ekin Deniz UZUN

Does Good Governance Have a Normative Value: A Theoretical and Practical Investigation in Pursuit of the Concept

Asst. Prof. Zülfiye YILMAZ YAMAÇ

The Crime of Sexual Assault Against a Spouse from the Perspective of Forensic Sciences

PRIVATE LAW

An Assessment of the Strict Liability for the Crypto-Asset Service Providers under Article 99/B/4 of the Capital Markets Law

The Legal Nature of Condominium Ownership According to the Basic Concepts of Property Law

Assoc. Prof. Ali Hulki CİHAN

Use of an Open Unsheeted Vehicle in the Contracts of Carriage of Goods by Road

Stay of Arbitration Proceedings Pending the Outcome of Related Parallel State Court Proceedings

Evaluation of the Scope of Compulsory Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance and the Provisions Governing Gross Negligence in Loss of Support Compensation as a Type of Coverage

Assoc. Prof. Cannur ERCAN

An Overview of the Concept of Evasion of Law in Private International Law

A New Perspective on the Debate over the Legal Status of Digital Platform Workers: The Presumption under Directive (EU) 2024/2831

Decentralized or Polycentric?: A Critical Perspective on the Governance Structure of Blockchain?

The Evaluation of the Court of Cassation's Practice That Prevents a Divorce Ruling Based on a Ground for Divorce Not Cited in the Lawsuit Petition

Asst. Prof. Fatma HIZIR ASRAV - Res. Asst. Mustafa TOPAL

A Legal Evaluation of the Additional Payments Demanded After the Sale of an Unregistered Motor Vehicle

Asst. Prof. Ece KARADUMAN

An Assessment of the Legal Nature and Validity of “Pay If Paid” and “Pay When Paid” Clauses in Subcontracting Agreements

Asst. Prof. Gökçe KURTULAN GÜNER

The Issue of the Inability to Appeal Final Judgments of the Court of Appeal that Overturn the First Instance Decision and Rule to the Contrary

Opinions on Hearing Minutes in Civil Procedure

Claims of Children and Grandchildren and its Correlation To The Hotchpot Claim

The Status of Digital Media Employees under the Press Labour Law and the Press Law

Asst. Prof. Uğur TÜLÜ

ARTICLE (NOT REVIEWED)

Prof. Dr. Cemal Bâli AKAL
